A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent queried the case and all knowledge articles, then used naive keyword matching in execute_python to select an article ID instead of querying relevant support records (e.g., communications or case history) to determine if a policy breach occurred and which specific article was involved, resulting in an incorrect answer.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
